name: geospoof-extension
description: Firefox extension for geolocation spoofing and location privacy

scripts.clean: rm -rf dist coverage web-ext-artifacts geospoof-*.zip geospoof-*.xpi
scripts.start:chrome: npm run build:chromium && web-ext run --source-dir dist --target=chromium --chromium-binary='/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome'
scripts.start:brave: npm run build:chromium && web-ext run --source-dir dist --target=chromium --chromium-binary='/Applications/Brave Browser.app/Contents/MacOS/Brave Browser'
scripts.start:opera: npm run build:chromium && web-ext run --source-dir dist --target=chromium --chromium-binary='/Applications/Opera.app/Contents/MacOS/Opera'
scripts.start:waterfox: npm run build:firefox && web-ext run --source-dir dist --firefox='/Applications/Waterfox.app/Contents/MacOS/waterfox'
scripts.start:android: web-ext run --source-dir dist --target=firefox-android --adb-remove-old-artifacts --android-device=$(adb devices | sed -n '2p' | awk '{print $1}')
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && web-ext build --source-dir dist
scripts.package:chromium: npm run build:chromium && mkdir -p web-ext-artifacts && cd dist && zip -r ../web-ext-artifacts/geospoof-chromium-v$(node -p "require('../package.json').version").zip .
scripts.validate: npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run lint:ext && npm run format:check && npm run test
scripts.validate:quiet: npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run lint:ext && npm run format:check && npm run test -- --reporter=dot 2>/dev/null
